author: Pixelastic
subject: docs(requirements): Add Algolia requirements to the doc
body:
BREAKING CHANGE: `facetName` is now named `attributeName` in all
widgets.

- Added a "requirement" button to all code examples
- Refactored the way switching from one button to another is working
- `s/facetName/attributeName/`
- Fixed a few typos in the documentation
- Updated BEM example
